sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72487" key="oi)noblabh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνο-βλᾰβής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n72487.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">addicted to drunkenness,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).186</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
